---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for uDOS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it?

**Example:** "As a [user type], I want [feature] so that [benefit]."

## 📝 Proposed Solution

How would you like to see this implemented?

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

Are there alternative approaches you've considered?

## 📊 Use Cases

Provide 1-3 specific examples of how this feature would be used:

1. **Use Case 1:**
   - User does: `...`
   - System responds: `...`
   - Result: `...`

2. **Use Case 2:**
   - ...

## 🎨 Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, command examples, or ASCII diagrams:

```
[Example command or interface]
```

## 🔗 Related Features

Are there existing features this would complement or depend on?

## 📚 Additional Context

Any other relevant information:
- Similar features in other tools?
- Community feedback or requests?
- Technical considerations?

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] This aligns with uDOS's [philosophy](https://github.com/fredporter/uDOS-dev/wiki/Philosophy)
- [ ] I've provided clear use cases
- [ ] I've considered implementation complexity
